topic: Agreement on Implementation of Article VII of GATT 1994
course_outcomes: Explain the purpose and structure of the WTO Customs Valuation Agreement
Apply Article 1 transaction value and its conditions correctly
Use the valuation methods in the correct sequence
Explain Article 8 additions and the role of objective and quantifiable data
Understand importer rights, customs powers, and the role of the annexes and committees

units.title: Why This Agreement Exists
units.unit_goal: Understand why the Agreement was created and why transaction value is central.

lessons.title: Purpose of the Agreement
lessons.goal: Understand the overall purpose of the Agreement.
micro_steps: Explain why customs valuation rules are needed
Explain why arbitrary or fictitious values are prohibited
Explain why customs value should be fair, uniform, and neutral

lessons.title: Why Transaction Value Comes First
lessons.goal: Understand the primacy of transaction value.
micro_steps: Explain why transaction value is the primary basis
Connect valuation to the actual commercial transaction
Explain why valuation should follow commercial practice

lessons.title: Customs Value and Trade Access
lessons.goal: Understand why valuation matters in world trade.
micro_steps: Explain why customs value matters for ad valorem duties
Explain how inflated values can reduce market access
Explain why valuation rules should not be used to combat dumping

lessons.title: Foundation Match
lessons.goal: Match the Agreement’s core ideas correctly.
micro_steps: Match transaction value to primary basis

lessons.title: Unit 1 Checkpoint
lessons.goal: Show you understand why the Agreement exists.
micro_steps: Explain the purpose of the Agreement
Explain why transaction value is preferred
Explain why arbitrary values are prohibited

units.title: Structure of the Agreement
units.unit_goal: Understand the internal structure of the Agreement and the role of its parts and annexes.

lessons.title: Main Parts of the Agreement
lessons.goal: Identify the four main parts of the Agreement.
micro_steps: Identify Part I as rules on customs valuation
Identify Part II as administration and dispute settlement
Identify Parts III and IV as special treatment and final provisions

lessons.title: Key Article Map
lessons.goal: Understand the main article groupings.
micro_steps: Locate the institutional and final articles

lessons.title: Annexes
lessons.goal: Understand the legal role of the annexes.
micro_steps: Explain Annex II on the Technical Committee
Explain Annex III on developing-country issues

lessons.title: Structure Match
lessons.goal: Match parts and annexes to their functions.
micro_steps: Match Part I to valuation rules
Match Annex I to interpretative guidance

lessons.title: Unit 2 Checkpoint
lessons.goal: Demonstrate understanding of the Agreement’s structure.
micro_steps: List the parts of the Agreement

units.title: Article 1: Transaction Value
units.unit_goal: Understand Article 1 in detail as the primary method of customs valuation.

lessons.title: Meaning of Transaction Value
lessons.goal: Define transaction value correctly.

lessons.title: The Four Conditions in Article 1.1
lessons.goal: Understand the conditions that must be satisfied for transaction value to be accepted.
micro_steps: Explain the condition or consideration test
Explain proceeds accruing to the seller

lessons.title: What Does Not Automatically Defeat Article 1
lessons.goal: Understand the limits of automatic rejection.
micro_steps: Recognize restrictions that do not substantially affect value

lessons.title: Article 1 Match
lessons.goal: Sort Article 1 conditions correctly.

lessons.title: Unit 3 Checkpoint
lessons.goal: Show you understand Article 1 as the foundation of valuation.

units.title: Related Parties and Acceptability of Price
units.unit_goal: Understand how related-party sales are treated and how price acceptability is tested.

lessons.title: Relationship Alone Is Not Enough
lessons.goal: Understand the basic rule on related parties.
micro_steps: Explain why relationship alone is not enough
Explain the central question of price influence
Explain customs’ duty to communicate concerns

lessons.title: Circumstances of Sale
lessons.goal: Understand how customs checks whether the relationship influenced the price.
micro_steps: Explain how customs examines the sale

lessons.title: Importer Test Values
lessons.goal: Understand the test values the importer may use.
micro_steps: List the test values in Article 1.2(b)
Explain that they are comparison tools only
Explain that substitute values may not be created under them

lessons.title: Who Is Related?
lessons.goal: Learn the Article 15 categories of related persons.
micro_steps: Identify the legal categories of related persons
Recall the 5 percent voting stock rule

lessons.title: Related-Party Match
lessons.goal: Match related-party concepts correctly.
micro_steps: Match test values to importer comparison rights

lessons.title: Unit 4 Checkpoint
lessons.goal: Demonstrate mastery of related-party valuation rules.
micro_steps: Explain test values and related-person categories

units.title: Articles 2 and 3: Identical and Similar Goods
units.unit_goal: Understand how customs uses identical and similar goods when Article 1 cannot be used.

lessons.title: Article 2: Identical Goods
lessons.goal: Understand the transaction value of identical goods.
micro_steps: Explain same commercial level and quantity logic
Explain why the lowest value is used if more than one is found

lessons.title: Article 3: Similar Goods
lessons.goal: Understand the transaction value of similar goods.
micro_steps: Explain adjustments for commercial level and quantity
Explain why the lowest value is used if more than one is found

lessons.title: Adjustments Under Articles 2 and 3
lessons.goal: Understand how adjustments work under the identical and similar goods methods.
micro_steps: Explain significant transport and distance differences

lessons.title: Identical vs Similar Match
lessons.goal: Differentiate identical and similar goods correctly.
micro_steps: Match all respects to identical goods
Match commercially interchangeable to similar goods
Match lowest qualifying value to both methods

lessons.title: Unit 5 Checkpoint
lessons.goal: Show you understand Articles 2 and 3.
micro_steps: Explain the role of adjustments and lowest value

units.title: Articles 5 and 6: Deductive and Computed Value
units.unit_goal: Understand deductive value and computed value and how they differ.

lessons.title: Article 5: Deductive Value
lessons.goal: Understand deductive value.
micro_steps: List the deductions made under Article 5

lessons.title: Article 6: Computed Value
lessons.goal: Understand computed value.

lessons.title: Greatest Aggregate Quantity
lessons.goal: Understand one of the most tested concepts in Article 5.
micro_steps: Explain greatest aggregate quantity in simple terms
Explain why it is not necessarily the highest price
Explain its use at the first commercial level after importation

lessons.title: Deductive vs Computed Match
lessons.goal: Differentiate Articles 5 and 6.
micro_steps: Match unit price in the importing country to Article 5
Match producer cost build-up to Article 6
Match importer request for reversal to Article 4

lessons.title: Unit 6 Checkpoint
lessons.goal: Demonstrate understanding of Articles 5 and 6.
micro_steps: Explain the reversal option between Articles 5 and 6

units.title: Article 7: Fallback and Prohibited Bases
units.unit_goal: Understand how fallback valuation works and what customs may never use.

lessons.title: Fallback Method Basics
lessons.goal: Understand Article 7 as the final method.
skills: data available in the country of importation
micro_steps: Explain why it must still follow the Agreement’s principles
Explain the role of data available in the country of importation

lessons.title: Prohibited Bases Under Article 7
lessons.goal: Memorize the prohibited valuation bases.
micro_steps: Explain why minimum values are banned
Explain why arbitrary and fictitious values are banned

lessons.title: Fallback Flexibility
lessons.goal: Understand the reasonable flexibility described in the interpretative notes.
micro_steps: Explain that fallback should use previously determined values where possible
Explain how reasonable flexibility differs from arbitrary valuation
Explain flexible use of earlier methods

lessons.title: Allowed or Prohibited Match
lessons.goal: Sort fallback ideas from prohibited bases.
micro_steps: Match reasonable flexibility to allowed fallback use

lessons.title: Unit 7 Checkpoint
lessons.goal: Show you understand Article 7 fully.
micro_steps: Explain the difference between flexibility and arbitrariness

units.title: Article 8 Additions
units.unit_goal: Understand Article 8 additions and when they may be made.

lessons.title: General Rule of Article 8
lessons.goal: Understand the logic of Article 8.
micro_steps: Explain why Article 8 is linked to Article 1
Explain why only Article 8 additions are allowed

lessons.title: Commissions, Containers, and Packing
lessons.goal: Understand Article 8.1(a).
micro_steps: Explain why buying commissions are excluded

lessons.title: Assists
lessons.goal: Understand Article 8.1(b).
micro_steps: Explain why assists must be apportioned reasonably

lessons.title: Royalties and Proceeds
lessons.goal: Understand Article 8.1(c) and 8.1(d).
micro_steps: Explain the treatment of reproduction rights
Explain proceeds accruing to the seller

lessons.title: Article 8 Match
lessons.goal: Sort Article 8 additions correctly.

lessons.title: Unit 8 Checkpoint
lessons.goal: Demonstrate strong understanding of Article 8 additions.

units.title: Currency, Confidentiality, Appeal, and Release of Goods
units.unit_goal: Understand the procedural rights and operational protections in Articles 9 to 17.

lessons.title: Currency Conversion and Confidentiality
lessons.goal: Understand Articles 9 and 10.
micro_steps: Explain time of exportation versus importation options

lessons.title: Appeal and Publication
lessons.goal: Understand Articles 11 and 12.
micro_steps: Explain the importer’s right of appeal

lessons.title: Release of Goods, Definitions, and Written Explanation
lessons.goal: Understand Articles 13, 15, and 16.
micro_steps: Explain release of goods when valuation is delayed
Explain key definitions like identical and similar goods
Explain the importer’s right to a written explanation

lessons.title: Rights and Protections Match
lessons.goal: Match the importer’s rights and procedural protections to the right article.
micro_steps: Match release of goods to Article 13

lessons.title: Unit 9 Checkpoint
lessons.goal: Show you understand the Agreement’s key procedural protections.
micro_steps: Explain release of goods against guarantee
Explain confidentiality and written explanation rights

units.title: Articles 17 to 24 and the Committees
units.unit_goal: Understand customs verification powers, the committee system, and final provisions.

lessons.title: Article 17 and Customs Verification
lessons.goal: Understand customs’ right to verify valuation information.
micro_steps: Explain why customs may verify statements and documents

lessons.title: The WTO Committee and Technical Committee
lessons.goal: Understand the institutions under Article 18.
micro_steps: Differentiate policy consultation from technical guidance

lessons.title: Consultations, National Legislation, Review
lessons.goal: Understand Articles 19 to 24 at a working level.
micro_steps: Explain special and differential treatment and technical assistance
Explain national legislation and annual review

lessons.title: Institution Match
lessons.goal: Match institutional roles correctly.
micro_steps: Match Technical Committee to technical interpretation

lessons.title: Unit 10 Checkpoint
lessons.goal: Demonstrate understanding of the administrative side of the Agreement.
micro_steps: Explain review, consultation, and national legislation obligations

units.title: Interpretative Notes and Technical Understanding
units.unit_goal: Use the interpretative notes to deepen exam understanding and apply the rules more confidently.

lessons.title: Sequential Application and GAAP
lessons.goal: Understand the general note and the role of generally accepted accounting principles.
micro_steps: Explain sequential application of methods from the notes

lessons.title: Price Actually Paid or Payable Note
lessons.goal: Understand the interpretative note to Article 1.
micro_steps: Explain dividends and buyer’s own activities

lessons.title: Notes to Articles 5, 6, 7, and 8
lessons.goal: Understand the notes most likely to appear in advanced exam questions.
micro_steps: Explain assist apportionment and objective data

lessons.title: Interpretation Match
lessons.goal: Match major interpretative note ideas to the relevant article.
micro_steps: Match indirect payment to the note on Article 1
Match greatest aggregate quantity to Article 5

lessons.title: Unit 11 Checkpoint
lessons.goal: Show that you can use the interpretative notes intelligently.
micro_steps: Explain the purpose of the interpretative notes
Explain one major note under Article 1
Explain one major note under Articles 5, 6, 7, or 8

units.title: Grand Mastery Path
units.unit_goal: Bring the whole Agreement together for revision, application, and exam readiness.

lessons.title: Method Sequence Quiz
lessons.goal: Review the valuation methods and their order.
micro_steps: Recognize where Articles 5 and 6 may switch

lessons.title: Article 1 and Article 8 Quiz
lessons.goal: Review transaction value and additions together.

lessons.title: Procedural Rights Quiz
lessons.goal: Review importer protections and customs powers.
micro_steps: Recall customs verification and release against guarantee

lessons.title: Integrated Valuation Scenario Lab
lessons.goal: Apply the Agreement to a realistic valuation case.
micro_steps: Choose the next method if Article 1 fails
Identify importer rights and customs powers in the case

lessons.title: Grand Checkpoint
lessons.goal: Demonstrate complete understanding of the Agreement.
micro_steps: Explain the purpose of the Agreement
Explain Article 1 and the method hierarchy
Explain importer rights and institutional structure

lessons.title: Legendary Review Path
lessons.goal: Final mixed review for long-term retention and exams.

daily_practice.description: Recycles weak lessons, commonly confused valuation methods, related-party rules, and Article 8 additions.
